title: Web Application Privilege Escalation
description: Detects privilege escalation attempts where users try to modify their role or access admin-only endpoints. OWASP A01:2021 Broken Access Control.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Web Application Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs') and ((('Attack Type' = 'privilege_escalation' or 'Attack Type' = 'role_manipulation' or 'Attack Type' = 'admin_bypass')) or (('Request Body' like '*"role":"admin"*' or 'Request Body' like '*"isAdmin":true*' or 'Request Body' like '*"role": "admin"*' or 'Request Body' like '*admin=true*' or 'Request Body' like '*role=admin*' or 'Request Body' like '*privilege=admin*')))
